SELECT toUInt16(input_value) FROM test_table WHERE input_value >= 0;
SELECT input_value, toUInt16(input_value) AS converted_value FROM test_table ORDER BY converted_value DESC;

SELECT a.input_value, b.converted_value FROM (SELECT input_value FROM test_table) AS a JOIN (SELECT toUInt16(input_value) AS converted_value FROM test_table) AS b ON a.input_value = b.converted_value;
SELECT toUInt16(x) FROM (SELECT input_value AS x FROM test_table WHERE input_value BETWEEN 0 AND 70000);
SELECT toUInt16(0), toUInt16(65535), toUInt16(65536), toUInt16(70000) FROM (SELECT 1 AS dummy);
SELECT toUInt16(CAST(input_value AS UInt32)) FROM test_table WHERE input_value < 70000;
